subcategory: 3D icon tabs with video backgrounds and glass-morphism effects
use_cases: E-commerce category/filter navigation with animated icons and video previews
Search bar icon switching with 3D visual effects for travel or hospitality platforms
Content type switching (Homes, Experiences, Services) with immersive video transitions
Feature showcase sections with premium glass-morphism styling and motion effects
Tab-based navigation with depth and dimensionality for modern SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A premium 3D icon tabs component featuring glass-morphism styling, animated video backgrounds, and smooth motion transitions between tab states. The component includes a styled 'NEW' badge with luminous effects and supports multiple categories like Homes, Experiences, and Services with distinct icon animations.
